Manage your account security and authentication preferences.

Notification Preferences
Choose how and when you want to be notified about important events.

Email Notifications

Order Updates

Get notified when new orders are placed or updated

Low Stock Alerts

Receive alerts when stock levels are low

Expiry Notifications

Get notified about medicines nearing expiry

Push Notifications

Urgent Orders

Receive immediate alerts for urgent orders

System Updates

Get notified about system maintenance and updates

SMS Notifications

Critical Alerts

Receive SMS for critical system alerts

Daily Summary

Get daily sales and order summary via SMS
